g.text: I apologize to everyone I may hurt through my actions.
I've done you all wrong, and I'm not asking for
The attack on us was absolutely revolting and
My children have been scarred from the experience.
I don't even know if my wife can make it through tonight.
I have had enough. Please spare my family from this.
They have nothing to do with all that I've done.
I am deleting all of my channels. Thanks to everyone
who has supported me this far.
Despite everything, I want you all to know that
